name: STM32U5A5 LQFP64
description: Generated from the STM32U5A5 alternate-function workbook and STM32U5A5AJ datasheet for STM32U5A5 LQFP64. This definition models the LQFP64 package with per-signal routing synthesized from Sheet1 package pins and Sheet2 AF0-AF15 matrix data. STM32U5A5 devices pair an Arm Cortex-M33 core with TrustZone security, low-power retention domains, rich multimedia I/O, and high-density external memory interfaces. They integrate advanced timers, high-speed USB OTG, TFT/DSI display paths, camera and parallel capture interfaces, and wide external memory routing options. This package definition exposes 59 peripheral blocks covering 9 timers, 4 low-power timers, 7 serial ports, 3 SPI controllers, 6 I2C controllers, 2 serial audio interfaces, 2 SDMMC host interfaces, 1 FDCAN controller, 1 USB OTG interface, 3 ADC instances, a dual-channel DAC, 2 on-chip operational amplifiers, 2 ultra-low-power comparators, a digital camera interface, LCD-TFT display signals, and 1 USB Type-C / Power Delivery controller.
